# Kevin's Tech Blog

> Tech blog covering LLM, AI, RAG, .NET, Python, and Cloud engineering.

## About
- Author: Kevin Wu
- Site: https://osisdie.github.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/osisdie
- Topics: LLM, AI, RAG, .NET, Python, Cloud, Architecture, DevOps

## Blog Posts
- [LLM 整合 RAG 技術的核心挑戰與突破方向](https://osisdie.github.io/blog/2026/rag-challenges-and-breakthroughs/): 深入分析 RAG 技術面臨的六大挑戰與四大突破解決方案

## Projects
- [Claude Code Channels](https://github.com/osisdie/claude-code-channels): Connect Claude Code to Telegram, Discord, Slack, LINE, WhatsApp
- [CodeDrill Mock Interview](https://github.com/osisdie/codedrill-mock-interview): AI-powered coding practice with mock interviews
- [.NET Foundation SDK](https://github.com/osisdie/dotnet-nwpie-foundation-sdk): Modular .NET SDK with 16 components
- [.NET WebAPI K8s Boilerplate](https://github.com/osisdie/dotnet-webapi-k8s-boilerplate): Production-ready .NET WebAPI with Kubernetes
- [.NET WebAPI Auth Boilerplate](https://github.com/osisdie/dotnet-webapi-auth-boilerplate): .NET WebAPI with JWT + Redis
- [.NET WebAPI CQRS Boilerplate](https://github.com/osisdie/dotnet-webapi-cqrs-boilerplate): .NET WebAPI with MediatR CQRS
